caption:
My life as an entrepreneur in a nutshell…

2004-2009: struggled mightily and hopped from one thing to another.  Made money with affiliate marketing, seo and eventually learned how to write copy.  Lots of up and down years and mostly made around $30k a year during this time

2010-2014: learned how to sell my own products and saw my income go up.  Had a few 6-figure years in a row.  Knew enough to be dangerous but thought I knew more than I did.

2014-2017: started a supplement company and scaled it to $23 million in sales.  I learned the ins and outs of running an 8-figure business, and all the work that goes into it.  It was thrilling, exhausting and scary at the same time.  I worked 12 hours a day, 7 days a week and didn’t see a problem with it until it was too late.

2017: sold my share in my supplement biz back to my partner and took a year off.  I was burnt out and work had consumed my life.  Spent my year off catching up on sleep, going to the park with my dogs and traveling around the world.  My body and my mind needed it.

2019-2021: Started to see the big picture when it comes to getting the money, freedom and happiness that I want.  I no longer chase money at all costs.  I no longer care about what I make compared to a competitor.  I care about living my life how I want to live it.  That’s what matters to me.  And I’ve found a lot of fulfillment in teaching others to do the same.

This journey hasn’t been easy.  Ive wanted to give up more times than I can count. 

But Im a testament to the idea that that if you put the work in and stick with it, things will get better. 

You CAN have the money, freedom and happiness that you want.  You can live life on your own terms.  That’s all waiting for you, if you just stick with it and you don’t give up. That’s the key.
